/usr/bin/ar qc ../../lib/liblbridge.a CMakeFiles/lbridge.dir/src/lbridge/lbridge.c.o CMakeFiles/lbridge.dir/src/lbridge/internals/socket_backends/lbridge_backend_socket_win_unix.c.o CMakeFiles/lbridge.dir/src/lbridge/internals/socket_backends/lbridge_win_wsa_init.c.o "CMakeFiles/lbridge.dir/src/lbridge/mbedtls-chachapoly/mbedtls/chacha20.c.o" "CMakeFiles/lbridge.dir/src/lbridge/mbedtls-chachapoly/mbedtls/chachapoly.c.o" "CMakeFiles/lbridge.dir/src/lbridge/mbedtls-chachapoly/mbedtls/constant_time.c.o" "CMakeFiles/lbridge.dir/src/lbridge/mbedtls-chachapoly/mbedtls/platform_util.c.o" "CMakeFiles/lbridge.dir/src/lbridge/mbedtls-chachapoly/mbedtls/poly1305.c.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../lib/liblbridge.a
